feed.title: BCD-watch: Changes Report (weekly)
feed.subtitle: A feed that summarizes changes to BCD weekly

entry.title: BCD Changes Report, Mon Jul 20 2026
entry.summary: Weekly summary of new changes in BCD data
entry.content:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 13 July 2026 through Monday, 20 July 2026🔗

Browser Support Changes: +5, -0

Support increases (5)

JAVASCRIPT

  1. javascript ➞ statements ➞ import ➞ import_source
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines

WEBASSEMBLY

  1. webassembly ➞ api ➞ SuspendError ➞ SuspendError
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. webassembly ➞ api ➞ SuspendError
    Added to Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines

WEBDRIVER

  1. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browsingContext ➞ downloadEnd_event ➞ download_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  2. webdriver ➞ bidi ➞ browsingContext ➞ downloadWillBegin_event ➞ download_parameter
    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines

BCD Metadata Changes: 70

Show all 70 changes

Note: The following represent changes to BCD metadata keys in the reported time period. Keys are not implementations, and they don't represent commitments toward implementation, etc. A new key occurring is perhaps a signal that some implementer was serious enough to add the key. Many of the features that are 'removed' are usually just 'moved' or 'renamed', but we don't have great ways to highlight that.

Backfilled entries (34)

The entries in this section saw support information change since the report on Friday, 10 July 2026, but all the supported browser versions given were more than a couple of months old. Typically, these are cases of support information being updated long after the support actually landed in a browser, but nobody ever updated the BCD entry.

API

  1. api ➞ Document ➞ parseHTML_static
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ GPUDevice ➞ adapterInfo
    Backfilled for Safari  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ ShadowRoot ➞ setHTML
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  4. api ➞ PermissionsPolicy
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  5. api ➞ PermissionsPolicy ➞ allowedFeatures
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  6. api ➞ PermissionsPolicy ➞ allowsFeature
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  7. api ➞ PermissionsPolicy ➞ features
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  8. api ➞ PermissionsPolicy ➞ getAllowlistForFeature
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ position-visibility ➞ anchors-valid
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  2 of 3 engines
  2. css ➞ properties ➞ position-visibility ➞ anchors-visible
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. css ➞ properties ➞ window-drag
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  4. css ➞ properties ➞ window-drag ➞ move
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  5. css ➞ properties ➞ window-drag ➞ none
    Backfilled for Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

WEBASSEMBLY

  1. webassembly ➞ instructions ➞ block
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. webassembly ➞ instructions ➞ br
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. webassembly ➞ instructions ➞ br_if
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  4. webassembly ➞ instructions ➞ br_table
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  5. webassembly ➞ instructions ➞ call
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  6. webassembly ➞ instructions ➞ drop
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  7. webassembly ➞ instructions ➞ end
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  8. webassembly ➞ instructions ➞ if_else
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  9. webassembly ➞ instructions ➞ loop
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  10. webassembly ➞ instructions ➞ nop
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  11. webassembly ➞ instructions ➞ return
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  12. webassembly ➞ instructions ➞ select
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  13. webassembly ➞ instructions ➞ unreachable
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  14. webassembly ➞ types ➞ exnref
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  15. webassembly ➞ types ➞ externref
    Backfilled for Firefox  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  16. webassembly ➞ types ➞ f32

New entries (36)

The entries in this section were not found in BCD on Friday, 10 July 2026, but are now present. These usually do not have any support information attached to them, and often have no corresponding MDN page. Sometimes, entries that appear here also appear in the next section (“Removed BCD entries”) because of a Working Group deciding on a rename.

API

entry.title: BCD Changes Report, Mon Jul 13 2026
entry.summary: Weekly summary of new changes in BCD data
entry.content:
Summary of BCD changes from Monday, 6 July 2026 through Monday, 13 July 2026🔗

Browser Support Changes: +5, -0

Support increases (5)

API

  1. api ➞ AnimationEvent ➞ animation
    Added to Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  2. api ➞ TransitionEvent ➞ animation
    Added to Chrome  ➞  3 of 3 engines
  3. api ➞ PerformanceEntry ➞ navigationId
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines
  4. api ➞ WheelEvent ➞ momentum
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

CSS

  1. css ➞ properties ➞ ruby-overhang ➞ spaces
    Added to Chrome  ➞  1 of 3 engines

BCD Metadata Changes: 251

Show all 251 changes

Note: The following represent changes to BCD metadata keys in the reported time period. Keys are not implementations, and they don't represent commitments toward implementation, etc. A new key occurring is perhaps a signal that some implementer was serious enough to add the key. Many of the features that are 'removed' are usually just 'moved' or 'renamed', but we don't have great ways to highlight that.

Backfilled entries (227)

The entries in this section saw support information change since the report on Friday, 3 July 2026, but all the supported browser versions given were more than a couple of months old. Typically, these are cases of support information being updated long after the support actually landed in a browser, but nobody ever updated the BCD entry.

entry.title: BCD Changes Report, Mon Jul 06 2026
entry.summary: Weekly summary of new changes in BCD data
entry.content:

BCD Metadata Changes: 135

Show all 135 changes

Note: The following represent changes to BCD metadata keys in the reported time period. Keys are not implementations, and they don't represent commitments toward implementation, etc. A new key occurring is perhaps a signal that some implementer was serious enough to add the key. Many of the features that are 'removed' are usually just 'moved' or 'renamed', but we don't have great ways to highlight that.

Backfilled entries (63)

The entries in this section saw support information change since the report on Monday, 29 June 2026, but all the supported browser versions given were more than a couple of months old. Typically, these are cases of support information being updated long after the support actually landed in a browser, but nobody ever updated the BCD entry.

    Added to Firefox  ➞  1 of 3 engines

BCD Metadata Changes: 61

Show all 61 changes

Note: The following represent changes to BCD metadata keys in the reported time period. Keys are not implementations, and they don't represent commitments toward implementation, etc. A new key occurring is perhaps a signal that some implementer was serious enough to add the key. Many of the features that are 'removed' are usually just 'moved' or 'renamed', but we don't have great ways to highlight that.

Backfilled entries (44)

The entries in this section saw support information change since the report on Friday, 19 June 2026, but all the supported browser versions given were more than a couple of months old. Typically, these are cases of support information being updated long after the support actually landed in a browser, but nobody ever updated the BCD entry.

Many of the features that are 'removed' are usually just 'moved' or 'renamed', but we don't have great ways to highlight that.
